Class AzureVectorStoreProperties

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.ai.vectorstore.properties.CommonVectorStoreProperties
org.springframework.ai.vectorstore.azure.autoconfigure.AzureVectorStoreProperties
@ConfigurationProperties("spring.ai.vectorstore.azure") public class AzureVectorStoreProperties extends CommonVectorStoreProperties
Configuration properties for Azure Vector Store.
Author:
Christian Tzolov, Alexandros Pappas
